claims.evidence_text: On average, HI (fG) were 0.46 (0.42), 0.38 (0.17), and 0.41 (0.28) for the years 1987, 1988, and 1989, respectively [spring wheat, Pullman WA]
claims.claim_summary: Spring wheat harvest index averaged 0.38-0.46 across years; intercept HIo=0.34, slope=0.21 vs post-anthesis growth.

claims.evidence_text: The rates of increase of HI were between 0.01 and 0.02 d-1, similar to those reported in wheat ... earlier flowering ... allows grain filling to occur before both temperature and the vapor pressure deficit increase
claims.claim_summary: Wheat harvest index increases at 0.01-0.02 per day during grain filling; earlier flowering raises HI.
